title: minecraft Abstergo Animus
description: A assassin's creed Minecraft Resource Pack
body:
I found a Broken Hidden blade resource pack and fixed the textures and added some of my own 

-Retextured All swords to be Hidden Blades

-Crying Obsidian Backround

-Animus themed Hud

-Assasin Armor trim

-Templar Armor trim

-More to come*

May not work on newer versions 
tho it has not been tested 

*
-Flintlock rifle
-Cane sword
-Flintlock pistol
-Optifine Armors

Bugs
the templar armor trim texture curently only works if trimed with Netherite (Fixed)
